channel.title: Beta Black Lotus
channel.description: A personal weblog. Notes, essays, and field recordings.

item.title: Welcome to Beta Black Lotus
item.description: A short note on why I started this weblog, what I plan to write about, and a few ground rules for the kind of place I want this to be.

item.title: On Keeping a Notebook in Public
item.description: Joan Didion wrote that we keep a notebook to remember what it was like to be ourselves. I think keeping one in public is a slightly different exercise.

item.title: Field Recording: The Creek in July
item.description: A short field recording from the creek behind the old mill, with notes on the equipment used and the sound of low water over smooth stones.

item.title: A Walk Through the Old Quarter
item.description: A photo essay from a morning walk through the old quarter, with a short video clip of the square at the top of the hill.

item.title: On Using Old Tools
item.description: A short defense of using software that is older than you are. Not out of nostalgia, but because the constraints are often the point.
